name: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Instruct
note: Instruction-tuned 7B; highest-scoring open 7B on HELM at launch (0.492 vs LLaMA-7B's 0.472).
verificationNotes: Confirmed via together.ai/blog/redpajama-7b (June 6, 2023): text states Instruct model 'outperforms LLaMA-7B and state-of-the-art open models such as Falcon-7B (Base and Instruct) and MPT-7B (Base and Instruct) on HELM by 2-9 points' and 'appears to be the best open instruct model at this scale.' Fetched arxiv.org/html/2411.12372 Table 8 directly and confirmed exact score 0.492 for RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Instruct verbatim.
